category_sources: Official GitLab README describes Proteinortho as a tool to detect orthologous genes.
source_facts.description says it detects orthologous genes within different species.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab repository https://gitlab.com/paulklemm_PHD/proteinortho uses the display name Proteinortho.
source_facts.name provides the package slug proteinortho.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README contains installation, synopsis, options, output description, and examples.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitLab repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://gitlab.com/paulklemm_PHD/proteinortho, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents FASTA input, sequence comparison, and orthology detection.
